purpose: Track-1 successor test: ESM-C 600M (EvolutionaryScale) vs ESM-2-650M and MAMMAL 458M on the 40-gene CRISPR-N panel. Same panel/ordering, same recipe (mean-pool ex-BOS/EOS + cosine), 1022-aa truncation to match the ESM-2 protocol. Success = NN-recall >= 0.80.

centered_anisotropy_check.note: Mean-centered embeddings before cosine (standard anisotropy fix). ESM-2-650M's headline 0.750 was its *centered* number.

verdict: ESM-C 600M LOSES at NN-recall 0.650 (centered) vs the 0.750 tie.
